# NutriCore

> AI-powered health coach for India — personalized diet plans, exercise routines, and Swiggy integration.

NutriCore is a mobile app that helps Indians eat better and move more with AI-generated 7-day meal plans built around Indian food (dal, idli, ragi, paneer), Swiggy-compatible ordering, Hindi & Kannada voice logging, and a 15-day body check that auto-adjusts your plan.

## Key facts

- **Founded by**: Prateek Hitli
- **Target market**: India — students, young professionals, budget-conscious users
- **Launch**: MVP targeting Q3 2026
- **Pricing**: Free (₹0) · Pro (₹299/month) · Family (₹799/month)
- **Contact**: hello@nutricore.space
- **Website**: https://nutricore.space
- **Languages supported**: English, Hindi, Kannada

## Core features

- Personalized 7-day Indian meal plans (calories + ₹ cost per meal)
- Hindi & Kannada voice food logging — say "I had ragi mudde and sambar" and macros are logged instantly
- Food photo AI — snap a meal, log macros without typing
- 1-tap Swiggy & Instamart integration — turn your weekly plan into a grocery cart or meal order
- Streak rewards with guilt-free cheat meal unlock after 30-day streak
- Beginner-friendly home/gym workout plans with GIF hints
- 15-Day Body Check — auto-adjusts your plan every 15 days as your body changes
- App pages: Dashboard, Food & Diet, Workout, Journal, Rewards, Profile

## Pricing

### Free — ₹0/month
- Basic meal suggestions
- Manual food logging
- Step counter

### Pro — ₹299/month
- AI-generated personalized 7-day meal plan
- AI exercise plan with GIF hints
- Food photo & voice logging (Hindi + Kannada)
- 1-tap Swiggy & Instamart integration
- Streak rewards and community challenges
- 15-Day Body Check and plan refresh
- Priority support

### Family — ₹799/month
- Everything in Pro
- Up to 5 user profiles
- Shared grocery lists
- Family streak challenges
- Dedicated dietitian support

## Why it exists

Current nutrition apps are built for Western food and Western users. Indian food databases are missing or inaccurate. Professional dietitians cost ₹1,000–₹3,000/month — out of reach for most Indians. NutriCore closes this gap with affordable AI guidance built specifically for Indian diets, budgets, and habits.

## Differentiation

- **Indian food database**: Built from scratch for dal, idli, ragi, paneer, and thousands of Indian dishes — not adapted from a Western database
- **Swiggy & Instamart integration**: The only health app that connects directly to India's largest food delivery and grocery platforms
- **Voice logging in Indian languages**: Supports Hindi and Kannada out of the box — no English required for logging
- **₹-aware meal planning**: Every meal plan includes per-meal cost in Indian Rupees so users can stay on budget
- **15-Day Body Check**: Automated plan re-assessment every 15 days — no need to manually recalculate macros as weight or habits change
- **Price**: At ₹299/month, NutriCore is 3–10x cheaper than a human dietitian (₹1,000–₹3,000/month)
